site.name: Marián Figula Portfolio
site.description: Professional portfolio of Marián Figula - Full-Stack Developer from Bratislava building websites, internal systems, and custom digital solutions. From presentation sites to complex business applications and process automation.

owner.name: Marián Figula
owner.education: Faculty of Electrical Engineering and Information Technology, STU Bratislava

projects.name: Stribog
projects.description: SaaS platform for entrepreneurs - invoices, payroll, orders, website and e-shop from one place. Full-stack including desktop app with virtual drive file sync.

projects.name: Instaview
projects.description: Backend infrastructure for an AI-powered HR platform automating first contact and candidate screening. Handles hundreds of parallel AI calls in real time.

projects.name: Everlution
projects.description: Development and maintenance of three live client projects across different industries: social org software, event discovery social network, and a winery e-shop.

projects.name: SMSolar
projects.description: Shopify plugin showing customers whether they qualify for a government subsidy covering up to 90% of solar installation costs, using regional air quality data.

projects.name: ScandiTrack
projects.description: Price tracker for IKEA products - enter a URL, set a price threshold, and get email notifications when the price drops.

projects.name: Clipboard PDF Text Changer
projects.description: Executable app that automatically corrects Slovak special character encoding when copying text from PDFs.

projects.name: TickTick Chrome Extension
projects.description: Chrome extension that automatically imports university gym sessions into the TickTick planning app via API.
